Select an intersection from the left list or the map.

Each intersection shows:
1. NEMA 12-movement grid (journeys + delay)
2. Turning-movement diagram with arrows scaled by journeys
3. Tempe ATSPM signal timing (cycle, splits, phases)
4. Matched ib-link → ob-link table with delay range
